pollTimes.description: Time at which polling should occur

hour.description: The hour of the day to trigger (24h format)

minute.description: The minute of the day to trigger

dayOfMonth.description: The day of the month to trigger

cronExpression.description:
Use custom cron expression. Values and ranges as follows:
  • Seconds: 0-59
  • Minutes: 0 - 59
  • Hours: 0 - 23
  • Day of Month: 1 - 31
  • Months: 0 - 11 (Jan - Dec)
  • Day of Week: 0 - 6 (Sun - Sat)

value.description: All how many X minutes/hours it should trigger

unit.description: If it should trigger all X minutes or hours

hour.description: The hour of the day to trigger (24h format)

minute.description: The minute of the day to trigger

dayOfMonth.description: The day of the month to trigger

cronExpression.description:
Use custom cron expression. Values and ranges as follows:
  • Seconds: 0-59
  • Minutes: 0 - 59
  • Hours: 0 - 23
  • Day of Month: 1 - 31
  • Months: 0 - 11 (Jan - Dec)
  • Day of Week: 0 - 6 (Sun - Sat)

value.description: All how many X minutes/hours it should trigger

unit.description: If it should trigger all X minutes or hours

fileCreated.description: When a new file is created

fileUpdated.description: When an existing file is modified

folderCreated.description: When a new folder is created

folderUpdated.description: When an existing folder is modified

simple.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

watchFolder.description: Whether to watch for the created folder in a given folder, rather than the entire OneDrive

watch.description: How to select which folder to watch

anyFile.description: Watch for updated files in the entire OneDrive

selectedFolder.description: Watch for updated folders inside a selected folder

selectedFile.description: Watch a specific file for updates

anyFolder.description: Watch for updated folders in the entire OneDrive

oneSelectedFolder.description: Watch a specific folder for updates

fileId.description: The file to operate on. The 'By URL' option only accepts URLs that start with 'https://onedrive.live.com'.

folderId.description: The folder to operate on. The 'By URL' option only accepts URLs that start with 'https://onedrive.live.com'.

folderChild.description: Whether to look for modified files/folders in all nested folders, rather than only direct descendants
